channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Air Zimbabwe Returns to London: Inside the Deal That Reopens the Harare Route
item.description: On 1 July, an Airbus A330 lifts off from Harare for London under the via Tendai Kuwanda #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tendai Kuwanda

item.title: Air Zimbabwe resumes London flights on 1 July @3menonaboat
item.description:
Air Zimbabwe wll operate the route as part of an arrangement

The post Air Zimbabwe resumes London flights on 1 July first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

via Three Men On Boat #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: Indigenous cattle: Zimbabwe’s time-tested answer to climate change @3menonaboat
item.description:
When climate doesn’t play ball, costs spike or supply chains fail. The deeper problem is a habitual distrust of local knowledge, writes Pepukai Mubako

The post Indigenous cattle: Zimbabwe’s time-tested answer to climate change first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

via Three Men On Boat #Zimbabwe #Climate #Environment #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: Auditors warn of RioZim material uncertainty risk @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Auditors warn of RioZim material uncertainty risk – herald Business Reporter RioZim Limited is teetering on the brink of structural collapse, with auditors dropping a bombshell report that raises “material uncertainty” over the company’s ability to survive as a going conc via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Maize supply rebounds on ZMX
item.description: GRAIN deliveries to the Zimbabwe Mercantile Exchange (ZMX) rose this week as peak har­vesting boosted farmer supplies, easing market shortages, lower­ing maize... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choi via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: ‘Skills gap threatening green manufacturing’

item.title: Teen pregnancies drop significantly across Zimbabwe
item.description: SHAMAINE CHIRIMUJIRI ZIMBABWE recorded a significant decline in teenage motherhood cases in 2024, with births among young girls dropping by over 20... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Subscrip via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: 14 Years, 5 Announcements, No Flight: Air Zim Says It’s Now Launching London Trips
item.description: By Farai D Hove | For more than a decade, Zimbabweans have been fed the same tantalising promise: Air Zimbabwe... Continue reading "14 Years, 5 Announcements, No Flight: Air Zim Says It’s Now Launching London Trips" via Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Why Zimbabwe Must Pay BIPA Farmers and Protect Its Future
item.description: By Dr Masimba Mavaza | HARARE — The word “BIPA” haunts Zimbabwe’s land debate. To some it means betrayal of... Continue reading "Why Zimbabwe Must Pay BIPA Farmers and Protect Its Future" via Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News
